accountID.title: accountID
accountID.description: The Salesforce Record ID of the Account to be updated

accountName.title: accountName
accountName.description: Maps to the Name field on the Account object

accountNumber.title: accountNumber
accountNumber.description: Maps to the AccountNumber field on the Account object

annual_revenue.title: annual_revenue
annual_revenue.description: Mapped to annual revenue for account record in $

billing_street.title: billing_street
billing_street.description: Mapped to billing street on account record

is_active.title: is_active
is_active.description: mapped to Active__C on account record: Yes or No

phone.title: phone
phone.description: Maps to the Phone field on the Account object

rating.title: rating
rating.description: Maps to the Rating field on the Account object. Valid values: Hot, Warm, Cold

type.title: type
type.description: Maps to the Type field on the Account object. Valid values: Prospect, Customer - Direct, Customer - Channel, Channel Partner / Reseller, Installation Partner, Technology Partner, Other
